name: Pasta and Kidney Bean Soup
recipeInstructions: Spray a 3-quart nonstick saucepan with nonstick cooking spray. Cook onion in the saucepan over medium heat for about 10 minutes, stirring frequently, until onion is tender. Stir in and crush the tomatoes. Add broth, orzo pasta, oregano, crushed red pepper, and garlic. Heat to boiling; reduce heat. Cover and simmer about 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until orzo is tender. Stir in beans. Simmer uncovered for about 10 more minutes or until beans are hot. Sprinkle with cheese and parsley. Makes 4 servings. Per serving: 275 calories, 4 grams fat.
